title: Checkbox
description: Checkbox component offers various features to enhance user interaction and understanding. It supports disabled and readonly modes, includes labels for descriptive text, provides hints for additional information, and allows for an indeterminate state. These capabilities make it a versatile tool for facilitating user selections and improving the overall user experience in applications.

sections.title: Hint
sections.description: You can add ax-form-hint to the check box

sections.title: Indeterminate
sections.description: You can pass true to indeterminate property in ax-check-box and the value must be null

sections.title: Disabled and Readonly
sections.description: Demonstrates disabled and readonly states of ax-check-box.

sections.title: Color variants
sections.description: Examples of default, primary and success colors.

sections.title: Validation (required)
sections.description: Using ax-form-field and ax-validation-rule to show an error message.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tab index of the checkbox. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Determines whether the checkbox is read-only. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the checkbox. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the value of the checkbox. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Sets the name of the checkbox.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the ID of the checkbox.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Indicates whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state.

props.name: color
props.description: Specifies the color theme of the checkbox. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Shows a loading state for the checkbox.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated: use ngModelChange instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value of the checkbox changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when an option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.
